short_summary: Iran deal near, NATO cuts debated
rationale: US-Iran deal progress and NATO Europe asset cuts are the two fresh policy-relevant events for American residents — one potentially positive for Middle East stability and oil prices, one raising domestic debate about defense posture.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal reported closer than ever; Pakistan cites breakthrough
top_events.summary: A US-Iran nuclear/sanctions deal would be a major foreign policy development affecting oil prices, Middle East stability, and the Trump administration's diplomatic legacy — directly relevant to US residents.

top_events.title: US to cut air and naval assets for NATO Europe
top_events.summary: Confirmed US military asset reductions for NATO Europe operations represent a concrete Trump policy shift, sparking domestic debate about America's global commitments and defense spending priorities.

top_events.title: Musk becomes first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on Nasdaq
top_events.summary: SpaceX's Nasdaq debut and Musk's historic wealth milestone are significant US financial market events, with broad investor interest and implications for tech sector valuations.
